magic_items.name: Elixir of Health
magic_items.description: Drinking this potion cures all magical contagions and ends the blinded, deafened, paralyzed, and poisoned conditions on the drinker.

magic_items.name: Elven Chain
magic_items.description: This chain mail or chain shirt grants a +1 bonus to AC, and the wearer is treated as trained with it even without medium or heavy armor training.

magic_items.name: Spell Scroll
magic_items.description: A spell scroll of level 4 or 5 is consumed after casting and uses save DC 15 with attack bonus +7.
